subcodes.first_line: O Nabil! Upon thee be My glory, My loving-kindness and My mercy, which have preceded all existence. We have, verily, made mention of every name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نبیل علیک بهائی و عنایتی و رحمتی التی سبقت الوجود انا ذکرنا کل اسم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
